title: Running Claude Code on Amazon Bedrock
summary: AWS Developers published a walkthrough on running Claude Code agentic tool via Amazon Bedrock with data residency within AWS infrastructure. The video covers environment setup, cross-region inference, prompt caching, the Bedrock Mantle endpoint, cost tracking per team, and Bedrock Guardrails for content governance.
writeup: This walkthrough from AWS Developers demonstrates running the Claude Code agentic tool through Amazon Bedrock, keeping data residency within AWS infrastructure. It covers environment setup, cross-region inference, prompt caching, the Bedrock Mantle endpoint, per-team cost tracking, and Bedrock Guardrails for content governance. The combination addresses operational concerns for teams deploying agentic coding workflows: where data lives, how inference scales across regions, how caching reduces repeated prompt costs, and how content is moderated and spending is attributed.
